topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate temperature adjustments based on current weather conditions, optimizing heating and cooling to enhance energy efficiency and comfort in the home.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat based on Weather.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN play a scenario using Myfox HomeControl to prevent pool water from freezing when below 0°C.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using LightwaveRF Heating to lower your house target temperature.
IF Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat THEN set temperature setting using NIBE Uplink to raise set temperature.
IF Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat THEN set Nest temperature to a configured threshold.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN play a scenario using Myfox HomeControl to turn off heating.
IF Temperature rises above from Nest Thermostat THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to keep it from getting too warm.
IF Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat THEN activate scene using Hunter Douglas PowerView to open shades.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature to a permanent hold using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature to a permanent hold using Honeywell Lyric to automatically turn on A/C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set TRV Position 5 using LightwaveRF Heating to fully open a TRV.
IF Sunrise from Weather Underground THEN set a zone temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to automatically turn off AC if it's cool outside.
IF Lock unlocked from August THEN set temperature range using Nest Thermostat.
IF Lock locked by specific person from August THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat when leaving home.
IF Device is plugged in from Android Battery THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to turn down the temperature when going to bed.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN start a zone using RainMachine for heated sidewalks.
IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN set mode using Wattio THERMIC to ensure it is OFF at 0:00.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN start a program using RainMachine to water flower beds.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to a minimum temperature if the weather turns cold.
IF Tomorrow's high rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature range using Nest Thermostat to lower cooling setpoint.
IF Someone talks to a conversation from Roger THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to turn the air up.
IF The security panel has been armed from HomeControl Flex THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat when leaving for the day.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to change to summer settings.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to turn heating off during sunny periods.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to turn off central heating.
IF Tomorrow's low drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature in location using Wiser Smart to modify heating temperature.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to cool down when outside temperature is unbearable.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature range using Nest Thermostat to maintain 69-71 degrees.
IF Sunrise from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Wattio THERMIC to 19°C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to turn AC to 85°F.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 77°F.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 70°F if outside temperature rises above 85°F.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to drop house temperature.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to start cooling when it gets too hot.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 25°C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 68°F in the bathroom.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to turn off AC.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 70°F when it gets cold.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to make home at least as cool as outside.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 70°F when temperature rises above 90°F.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN send a command using openHAB if local temperature exceeds set limit.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN send a command using openHAB if local temperature is below 22°C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set a zone temperature using Honeywell evohome to 18 degrees for 4 hours.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature for a period of time using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set temperature for a period of time using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort to cool if outside temperature gets too warm.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature to a permanent hold using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN start a zone using RainMachine for heated sidewalks.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to put house into Economy mode during hot days.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome if current temperature rises above 21°C.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to turn off heating above 19 degrees outside.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature to a permanent hold using Honeywell Lyric when it drops below 32°F.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN disable a quick action using Honeywell evohome if current temperature drops below 10°C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to boost heating if temperature drops.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to trigger a custom program when temperature drops below a setpoint.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set fan to on or auto using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort if temp rises more than 76°F.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN disable a quick action using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat if outside temperature drops below a configured threshold.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN enable quick action using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat if condition changes to cloudy.

IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable quick action using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat to turn off heating if outside temperature rises above a configured threshold.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN start a program using RainMachine to water flower beds and turf on high temperatures above 93°F.
IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat for night heating.
IF Sleep mode enabled from UP by Jawbone THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to keep the house cool.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN set standby mode using Heatmiser for selected heating zone.
IF Sunrise from Weather Underground THEN set mode using Wattio THERMIC to automatic.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set mode using Wattio THERMIC to manual/automatic/off.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN set mode using Wattio THERMIC if condition changes to snow.
IF Tomorrow's low drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Caleo to prepare for a very cold tomorrow.
IF Temperature drops below from ThermoPeanut THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to adjust for baby's room.
IF Temperature rises above from ThermoPeanut THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to adjust for baby's room.
IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to 65°F at 11 pm.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN change temperature setpoints using GE Appliances Refrigerator if a power outage is likely.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN set a zone temperature using Honeywell evohome if condition changes to snow.
IF Tomorrow's high rises above from Weather Underground THEN enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome to switch off heating if forecast is above 20°C.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN set temperature using Wattio THERMIC to a configured threshold.
IF Sunset from Weather Underground THEN set mode using Wattio THERMIC to manual/automatic/off.
IF Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat THEN voice announcement using Ubi to check your furnace.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to a specific temperature.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to turn off HVAC system during peak energy hours.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat for sleep.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN start cool mode using tado Air Conditioning to turn on AC.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN set a zone temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat to a specific temperature.
IF Temperature drops below from Energenie Mi|Home THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat controlled by eTRV temperature.
IF Temperature drops below from Sen.se Mother THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to adjust for baby's room.
